mapper.select: SELECT ir.interest_region_id, ir.member_id, r.region_id, r.lawd_cd, r.legal_dong_code, r.sido, r.sigungu, r.umd_nm, ir.created_at FROM interest_regions ir INNER JOIN regions r ON r.region_id = ir.region_id WHERE ir.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.sido, r.sigungu, r.umd_nm
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO regions (lawd_cd, legal_dong_code, sido, sigungu, umd_nm) VALUES (#{lawdCd}, #{legalDongCode}, #{sido}, #{sigungu}, #{umdNm}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE legal_dong_code = VALUES(legal_dong_code), sido = VALUES(sido), sigungu = VALUES(sigungu)
INSERT IGNORE INTO interest_regions (member_id, region_id) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{regionId})
